name: Felo Slides
tagline: Generate PPT/presentation decks from a single prompt via Felo PPT Task API.
description:
Felo Slides lets you create presentation slides directly from Claude Code. Describe your topic or outline and get a shareable PPT link. Uses the Felo v2 PPT Task API: create task, poll until completion, return ppt_url (or live_doc_url). Ideal for product pitches, meeting decks, and turning notes into slides.

Trigger by intent (e.g. "Create a 10-slide product pitch") or explicitly with /felo-slides. Requires FELO_API_KEY from felo.ai. Handles async workflow with configurable poll interval and max wait.
